---
title: "01_data_prep"
author: "Francis Barnabe Kengne"
date: "2026-03-21"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(usethis)

# 1. Load raw Excel files using system.file()
MatrixData <- readxl::read_excel(
  system.file("extdata", "MatrixData.xlsx", package = "ssamixr"),
  sheet = "MatrixData"
)
names(MatrixData) <- make.names(names(MatrixData))

StCharacteristics <- readxl::read_excel(
  system.file("extdata", "StudyCharacteristics.xlsx", package = "ssamixr"),
  sheet = "Sheet1"
)
names(StCharacteristics) <- make.names(names(StCharacteristics))

# 2. Merge them
MatrixData_aggregated <- dplyr::left_join(
  MatrixData,
  StCharacteristics,
  by = c("Study", "Country..Area.District")
)

# 3. Coerce logical column
MatrixData_aggregated$RowParticipantAssignment <-
  as.logical(MatrixData_aggregated$RowParticipantAssignment)

# 4. Save as package data
usethis::use_data(MatrixData_aggregated, overwrite = TRUE)
```
